title: abronia umbellata subsp. platyphylla
intro: Abronia umbellata subsp. platyphylla, also known as the desert abronia, is a subspecies of shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abronia umbellata subsp. platyphylla include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
